title: Save label set for further use
excerpt: Is it possible to save a label set to use in in different boards and not copy it manually (ex. list of countries etc)?

posts.author: martiran (Alexander)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to save a label set to use in in different boards and not copy it manually (ex. list of countries etc)?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @martiran

Unfortunately that feature (column templates) is hidden behind the ENT version.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @martiran - you can setup your default labels that would apply to every new status/label you create. You can find more on how to do this with the link below (just scroll to the bottom):

The Status Column – Support (monday.com)

image722×612 84.7 KB

As @basdebruin mentioned “column templates” are only available within the Enterprise package which allows you to save column styles and apply to create new columns from it.

Thanks!
Mark

Green Llamas

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
